criteria.name: Noon Observation Filter — ADT
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11NoonObservationFilter::test_filter_noon_observations_selects_adt_noon_row fails with ImportError because pea_met_network.cleaning does not export filter_noon_observations.

criteria.name: Noon Observation Filter — AST
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11NoonObservationFilter::test_filter_noon_observations_selects_ast_noon_row fails with ImportError because pea_met_network.cleaning does not export filter_noon_observations.

criteria.name: 24h Rain Sum
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11NoonObservationFilter::test_filter_noon_observations_sums_previous_24h_rain fails with ImportError because pea_met_network.cleaning does not export filter_noon_observations.

criteria.name: Daily FWI Calculation Uses Startup Values and Reference Functions
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11DailyFWI::test_calculate_fwi_daily_uses_startup_values_and_reference_functions fails with ImportError because pea_met_network.cleaning does not export calculate_fwi_daily.

criteria.name: Carry Forward on Missing Noon
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11DailyFWI::test_calculate_fwi_daily_carries_forward_on_missing_noon fails with ImportError because pea_met_network.cleaning does not export calculate_fwi_daily.

criteria.name: Latitude Default and Override
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11DailyFWI::test_calculate_fwi_daily_uses_default_latitude_and_override fails with ImportError because pea_met_network.cleaning does not export calculate_fwi_daily.

criteria.name: Config default fwi_mode
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11CliAndConfig::test_cleaning_config_declares_fwi_mode_default_extended raises KeyError: 'fwi_mode'; docs/cleaning-config.json lacks required fwi.fwi_mode='extended'.

criteria.name: CLI accepts --fwi-mode compliant
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py::TestAC11CliAndConfig::test_cli_accepts_fwi_mode_compliant fails because __main__.py rejects --fwi-mode as an unrecognized argument.

failing_nodes.message: AC-11-01/02/03 FAIL: filter_noon_observations() is missing or not exported from pea_met_network.cleaning.
AC-11-04/05/06 FAIL: calculate_fwi_daily() is missing or not exported from pea_met_network.cleaning.
AC-11-07 FAIL: config is missing required fwi.fwi_mode default set to extended.
AC-11-08 FAIL: CLI parser does not accept --fwi-mode compliant.
Repo-shape test fails because unexpected repo-root artifact pipeline.log is present.
Repo-shape test fails because unexpected repo-root artifact pipeline_run2.log is present.

summary: Lisa REJECT: Phase 11 is not implemented enough to satisfy the new acceptance criteria. The required compliant-mode API is absent from src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py, docs/cleaning-config.json lacks fwi.fwi_mode, and src/pea_met_network/__main__.py does not parse --fwi-mode compliant. Full pytest also fails a repo-shape guard because pipeline.log and pipeline_run2.log exist at repo root. Artifact validation and pre-flight are both SKIP for phase 11, and martin-lint shows only medium/low issues, so the blocking failures are the missing phase-11 implementation plus the stray root log files.
